title: 1-2 Puzzle Game

requirements.text: Implement a sliding puzzle game backend that stores player scores and best moves. The backend should expose functions to: save a completed puzzle score (playerName, moveCount, timeInSeconds), retrieve the top 10 leaderboard entries sorted by fewest moves, and reset/clear leaderboard entries.

quotes: Give me a one two pazal game

acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor exposes saveScore, getLeaderboard, and clearLeaderboard functions
Leaderboard returns top 10 entries sorted by moveCount ascending

requirements.text: Implement a 1-2 sliding number puzzle game on the frontend. The puzzle is a classic 15-puzzle (4x4 grid with tiles numbered 1–15 and one empty space). The player slides tiles into the empty space to arrange them in order from 1–15. Features must include: randomized shuffled starting state, move counter, elapsed timer, win detection with congratulations message, a New Game button to restart, and a leaderboard view showing top scores fetched from the backend.

quotes: Give me a one two pazal game

acceptanceCriteria: 4x4 grid renders tiles 1–15 plus one empty space
Tiles adjacent to the empty space are clickable and slide into the empty position
Move counter increments on each valid tile slide
Timer starts on first move and stops when puzzle is solved
Winning state is detected when tiles are in order 1–15 with empty space at bottom-right
Congratulations modal/screen appears on win, prompting player to save score
New Game button resets the board with a new shuffle
Leaderboard tab/section displays top 10 scores from backend

requirements.text: Apply a clean, modern arcade-retro visual theme throughout the app. Use a dark background with vibrant neon tile colors, bold pixel-style or monospace typography, subtle glowing effects on interactive tiles, and smooth CSS transitions for tile slides. The layout should be centered, minimal, and focused on the puzzle grid.
acceptanceCriteria: App uses a dark background with neon accent colors consistently
Tile slide animation is smooth (CSS transition)
Typography is bold and arcade-inspired throughout
Layout is centered and works on standard desktop screen sizes

requirements.text: Generate and render a custom logo image for the game header — a stylized tile grid icon with glowing number tiles.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo image is displayed in the app header
Image is served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated

constraints: All backend logic must remain in the single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not use external databases or third-party APIs
nonGoals: User authentication or Internet Identity integration

required: Stylized 4x4 tile grid with glowing neon numbered squares on a dark background, arcade-retro style logo (puzzle-logo.dim_256x256.png)
